content.problemStatement:
Chef has a string SSS. He also has another string PPP, called pattern. He wants to find the pattern in SSS, but that might be impossible. Therefore, he is willing to reorder the characters of SSS in such a way that PPP occurs in the resulting string (an anagram of SSS) as a substring.

Since this problem was too hard for Chef, he decided to ask you, his genius friend, for help. Can you find the lexicographically smallest anagram of SSS that contains PPP as substring?

Note: A string BBB is a substring of a string AAA if BBB can be obtained from AAA by deleting several (possibly none or all) characters from the beginning and several (possibly none or all) characters from the end.
constraints: SSS and PPP contain only lowercase English letters
there is at least one anagram of SSS that contains PPP
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single string SSS.
The second line contains a single string PPP.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one string ― the smallest anagram of SSS that contains PPP.

sampleTestCases.input:
3
akramkeeanany
aka
supahotboy
bohoty
daehabshatorawy
badawy

3
